2604.13561.title: CLIP Architecture for Abdominal CT Image-Text Alignment and Zero-Shot Learning: Investigating Batch Composition and Data Scaling
2604.13561.paper_summary: Vision-language models trained with contrastive learning on paired medical images and reports show strong zero-shot diagnostic capabilities, yet the effect of training batch composition on learned representations remains unexplored for 3D medical imaging. We reproduce Merlin, a dual-encoder model that aligns 3D abdominal CT volumes with radiology reports using symmetric InfoNCE loss, achieving a zero-shot macro F1 of 74.45% across 30 findings (original: 73.00%). We then investigate two axes of variation. First, we control the normal-to-abnormal ratio within training batches at 25:75, 50:50, and 75:25 using section-level balanced sampling on the full dataset. All three configurations underperform the unbalanced baseline by 2.4 to 2.8 points, with 75:25 achieving the best result (72.02%) among balanced variants. Second, we conduct data scaling ablations on a 4,362-study subset, training with 20%, 40%, and 100% of the data. Performance scales sub-linearly from 65.26% to 71.88%, with individual findings varying dramatically in data sensitivity. Enforcing 50:50 balanced sampling on the same subset further degrades performance to 68.01%, confirming that explicit class balancing hurts regardless of dataset or balancing granularity. Our results indicate that the stochastic diversity of random sampling, combined with Merlin's alternating batching over anatomical subsections, provides more effective regularization than engineered class ratios at the small batch sizes required by 3D medical volumes.
2604.13561.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型在配對的醫學影像和報告上進行對比學習訓練，顯示出強大的零-shot 診斷能力，然而訓練批次組成對學習表示的影響在 3D 醫學影像中仍未被探索。我們重現了 Merlin，一個雙編碼器模型，使用對稱的 InfoNCE 損失將 3D 腹部 CT 影像與放射學報告對齊，實現了 30 種發現的零-shot 宏觀 F1 分數為 74.45%（原始：73.00%）。接著，我們調查了兩個變化軸。首先，我們在訓練批次中控制正常與異常的比例為 25:75、50:50 和 75:25，使用全數據集的區段級平衡抽樣。這三種配置的表現均比不平衡基線低 2.4 到 2.8 分，其中 75:25 在平衡變體中達到最佳結果（72.02%）。其次，我們在 4,362 研究子集上進行數據縮放消融，使用 20%、40% 和 100% 的數據進行訓練。性能從 65.26% 逐步提升至 71.88%，而各個發現的數據敏感性變化劇烈。在同一子集上強制執行 50:50 的平衡抽樣進一步降低了性能至 68.01%，確認明確的類別平衡會造成傷害，無論數據集或平衡的細緻程度如何。我們的結果表明，隨機抽樣的隨機多樣性，加上 Merlin 在解剖子區域上的交替批次，提供了比在 3D 醫學影像所需的小批次大小的工程類別比率更有效的正則化。
2604.13561.author: Shivika et.al.
